---
title: "test_overwatch_empire.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\empire_tests\test_overwatch_empire.py"
loc: 29
complexity: 1
logic_score: 7.02
style_score: 3.77
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 3.29
---

## Intent
The `test_overwatch_empire.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on test_stats_collector_logic, test_stats_collector_missing. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via test_stats_collector_logic, test_stats_collector_missing. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 7.0/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 4 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [json](file://json)
- [src.tools.overwatch](file://src.tools.overwatch)

### Exports
- `test_stats_collector_logic`
- `test_stats_collector_missing`
